title: English 10 Reflection, Journal, and Short Response Rubric
description: English 10 starter rubric for reflection, journal, and short response aligned to grades 9-10 2023 NJSLS-ELA references. These materials are teacher-editable starter review materials aligned to common high school ELA writing tasks and 2023 NJSLS-ELA references. They are not official state curriculum, not district grading policy, and not automatic evaluation.

criteria.label: Focus
criteria.description: How clearly the response addresses the prompt or reflective purpose.

levels.label: Advanced
levels.description: The focus is strong, purposeful, and effective for English 10.
levels.student_facing_feedback: The focus is strong, purposeful, and effective for English 10.
levels.teacher_note: Use when focus is ready or nearly ready for classroom expectations.

levels.label: Secure
levels.description: The focus is clear and mostly effective, with a few places that could be developed further.
levels.student_facing_feedback: The focus is clear and mostly effective, with a few places that could be developed further.
levels.teacher_note: Use when focus is ready or nearly ready for classroom expectations.

levels.label: Developing
levels.description: The focus is present but uneven, general, or only partly connected to the writing purpose.
levels.student_facing_feedback: The focus is present but uneven, general, or only partly connected to the writing purpose.
levels.teacher_note: Use when focus needs targeted teacher feedback before final submission.

levels.label: Beginning
levels.description: The focus is limited or difficult to follow and needs substantial revision.
levels.student_facing_feedback: The focus is limited or difficult to follow and needs substantial revision.
levels.teacher_note: Use when focus needs targeted teacher feedback before final submission.

levels.label: Insufficient evidence
levels.description: There is not enough evidence of focus to score this criterion yet.
levels.student_facing_feedback: There is not enough evidence of focus to score this criterion yet.
levels.teacher_note: Use when focus needs targeted teacher feedback before final submission.

module_details.notice: These materials are teacher-editable starter review materials aligned to common high school ELA writing tasks and 2023 NJSLS-ELA references. They are not official state curriculum, not district grading policy, and not automatic evaluation.
module_details.emphasis: clear claims, relevant evidence, clear explanation, organized ideas, transitions, conventions, basic synthesis, coherent narrative sequence, and reflection.
